title: Iran attacks in Strait of Hormuz are ‘economic terrorism against every nation,’ UAE oil CEO says
summary_full: Sultan Ahmed Al Jaber, CEO of the UAE's state-owned oil company, said the Strait of Hormuz must re-open to resolve the supply shock.
summary_public: Sultan Ahmed Al Jaber, CEO of the UAE's state-owned oil company, said the Strait of Hormuz must re-open to resolve the supply shock.

IR.label: negative
